title.ko: 선형 또는 각속도, 가속, 감속 또는 충격의 측정; 운동의 존재 또는 부재 표시; 운동의 방향 표시(회전 운동 효과(gyroscopic)를 이용한 각속도 측정 G01C 19/00; 둘 이상의 운동변량을 측정하기 위한 결합된 측정 장치 G01C23/00; 음속의 측정 G01H5/00; 광속의 측정 G01J7/00; 전파 또는 기타 파동의 반사 또는 재방사 및 전파 효과, 예. 도플러효과(Doppler), 전파시간 또는 전파방향에 기초하여 고체 물체의 방향 또는 속도 결정, G01S; 핵방사선 속도 측정 G01T)
title.en: MEASURING LINEAR OR ANGULAR SPEED, ACCELERATION, DECELERATION OR SHOCK; INDICATING PRESENCE OR ABSENCE OF MOVEMENT;  INDICATING DIRECTION OF MOVEMENT  (measuring angular rate using gyroscopic effects G01C0019000000;combined measuring devices for measuring two or more variables of movement G01C0023000000;measuring velocity of sound G01H0005000000;measuring velocity of light G01J0007000000;determining direction or velocity of solid objects by reflection or reradiation of radio or other waves and based on propagation effects, e.g. Doppler effect, propagation time or direction of propagation, G01S;measuring speed of nuclear radiation G01T)

definition.ko: 운동 또는 운동방향의 지시 G01P13/00 고체의 직선속도 또는 각속도의 측정 수단의 작용이 통상의 원리에 의한 것이라 는 것을 특징으로 하는 것 G01P3/00 적산하는 것; 자이로스코프 효과에 의한 것; 평균하는 것 G01P7/00; 9/00; 11/00 유체 속도 또는 고체와 유체간의 상대속도 측정 G01P5/00 가속도 또는 가속도의 급격한 변화 측정 G01P15/00 세부 G01P1/00 기능시험 또는 교정 G01P21/00

title.en: Details of instruments
Housings
Special adaptations of driving means
Indicating devices, e.g. for remote indication
Arrangements of scales, pointers, lamps, or acoustic indicators, e.g. in automobile speedometers
for indicating predetermined speeds
by the detection of the position of the indicator needle
Recording devices
for permanent recording
for erasable recording, e.g. magnetic recording

title.ko: 직선 또는 각속도의 측정; 직선 또는 각속도의 차이 측정(G01P 5/00에서 G01P 11/00 우선; 회전 운동 효과(gyroscopic)를 이용한 각속도 측정 G01C 19/00)
title.en: Measuring linear or angular speed; Measuring differences of linear or angular speeds (G01P0005000000-G01P0011000000 take precedence;measuring angular rate using gyroscopic effects G01C0019000000)

definition.ko: 그룹 G01P3/02 ~ G01P3/64는 중요한 측정 방법으로 구분됩니다. 따라서, 최종 표시를 하기 위한 다른 방법의 단순한 적용은 분류에 영향을 미치지 않습니다.

title.ko: 기계적 수단의 사용에 특징이 있는 장치
title.en: Devices characterised by the use of mechanical means
by comparing two speeds
using a friction gear
using differential gearing
by actuating an indicating element, e.g. pointer, for a fixed time
by making use of a system excited by impact
by exciting one or more mechanical resonance systems
by using centrifugal forces of solid masses
transferred to the indicator by mechanical means
transferred to the indicator by fluid means
transferred to the indicator by electric or magnetic means
by using friction effects (G01P0003060000 takes precedence)
Devices characterised by the use of fluids
by using pumps
by using centrifugal forces of fluids
in a rotary container communicating with a fixed container
by using friction effects

title.ko: 광학적 수단의 사용에 특징이 있는 장치, 예. 적외선, 가시광선 또는 자외선의 사용(G01P 3/68이 우선)
title.en: Devices characterised by the use of optical means, e.g. using infrared, visible, or ultraviolet light (G01P0003680000 takes precedence)
using photographic means
using stroboscopic means

title.ko: 전기적 또는 자기적 수단의 사용에 특징이 있는 장치(G01P 3/66이 우선)
title.en: Devices characterised by the use of electric or magnetic means (G01P0003660000 takes precedence)
for measuring angular speed (G01P0003560000 takes precedence)
by measuring amplitude of generated current or voltage
by measuring frequency of generated current or voltage
of pulse signals
delivered by nuclear radiation detectors
delivered by variable capacitance detectors
delivered by contact-making switches
delivered by photo-electric detectors
delivered by rotating magnets
delivered by variable reluctance detectors
Digital circuits therefor
using eddy currents
where the indicating means responds to forces produced by the eddy currents and the generating magnetic field
for measuring linear speed (G01P0003560000 takes precedence)
by measuring amplitude of generated current or voltage
by measuring frequency of generated current or voltage
for comparing two speeds
by measuring or comparing amplitudes of generated currents or voltages
by measuring or comparing frequency of generated currents or voltages
Devices characterised by the determination of the variation of atmospheric pressure with height to measure the vertical components of speed

title.ko: 일정거리의 주행시간 측정에 의해서 특징지어지는 장치
title.en: Devices characterised by the determination of the time taken to traverse a fixed distance

title.ko: 전기적 또는 자기적 수단을 사용하는 것(G01P 3/80이 우선)
title.en: using electric or magnetic means (G01P0003800000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 광학적 수단을 사용하는 것, 즉 적외선, 가시광선, 자외선의 사용하는 것(G01P 3/80이 우선)
title.en: using optical means, i.e. using infrared, visible, or ultraviolet light (G01P0003800000 takes precedence)
using auto-correlation or cross-correlation detection means

title.ko: 유체, 예. 공기류의 속도측정 유체에 관련된 물체, 예. 선박의 항공기의 상대속도의 측정(유체의 양을 재기 위해 속도측정 장치를 사용하는 것 G01F)
title.en: Measuring speed of fluids, e.g. of air stream; Measuring speed of bodies relative to fluids, e.g. of ship, of aircraft (application of speed-measuring devices for measuring volume of fluids G01F)
by using swirlflowmeter
by measuring forces exerted by the fluid on solid bodies, e.g. anemometer
using deflection of baffle-plates
using rotation of vanes
with electrical coupling to the indicating device
by measuring variation of an electric variable directly affected by the flow, e.g. by using dynamo-electric effect
by measuring thermal variables
using variation of resistance of a heated conductor
by measuring differences of pressure in the fluid
using Pitot tubes
Arrangements or constructions of Pitot tubes
Coupling arrangements to the indicating device
with the determination of Mach number

title.ko: 유체가 일정거리를 주행하는 시간을 측정하는 것
title.en: by measuring the time taken by the fluid to traverse a fixed distance

title.ko: 유체의 흐름에 의해 운반되는 미립자를 사용하는 것(G01P 5/22가 우선)
title.en: using particles entrained by a fluid stream (G01P0005220000 takes precedence)
using auto-correlation or cross-correlation detection means
by measuring the direct influence of the streaming fluid on the properties of a detecting acoustical wave
by measuring the direct influence of the streaming fluid on the properties of a detecting optical wave

title.ko: 가속도 적산에 의한 속도측정(관성 항법, 즉, 항행하는 대상에 대해 속도 또는 가속도 적산에 의해, 위치 또는 속도를 계산하는 것 G01C 21/16)
title.en: Measuring speed by integrating acceleration (inertial navigation, i.e. calculating position or speed aboard the object being navigated, by integration of speed or acceleration G01C0021160000)

title.ko: 평균속도의 측정(일정거리의 주행시간의 측정에 의한 것 G01P 3/64, G01P 5/18)
title.en: Measuring average value of speed (by determining time taken to traverse a fixed distance G01P0003640000, G01P0005180000)
Measuring average speed of a number of bodies, e.g. of vehicles for traffic control
Indicating or recording presence or absence of movement; Indicating or recording of direction of movement
Indicating direction only, e.g. by weather vane
Indicating positive or negative direction of a linear movement or clockwise or anti-clockwise direction of a rotational movement

title.ko: 가속도의 측정; 감속도의 측정; 충격, 즉 가속도의 급격한 변화의 측정
title.en: Measuring acceleration; Measuring deceleration; Measuring shock, i.e. sudden change of acceleration
by making use of inertia forces (G01P0015140000 takes precedence)
by using non-electrical means
for indicating maximum value
using members subjected to a permanent deformation
with conversion into electric or magnetic values
by piezoelectric pick-up
by photoelectric pick-up
by vibratory elements
by vibratory strings
by magnetically sensitive devices
by inductive pick-up
by alteration of electrical resistance
by capacitive pick-up
by measuring the force required to restore a proofmass subjected to inertial forces to a null position
by making use of contacts which are actuated by a movable inertial mass
by making use of gyroscopes
by evaluating the time-derivative of a measured speed signal
in two or more dimensions
Testing or calibrating of apparatus or devices covered by the other groups of this subclass
of speedometers
